zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham於1635年出生在英國多瑟特斯瓦納。她於1689年10月6日與Thomas Giles Chapman在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 斯普萊頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年11月6日在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特斯瓦納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham于1635年出生在英国多瑟特斯瓦納。她于1689年10月6日与Thomas Giles Chapman在英国多瑟特文特爾布恩 斯普萊頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1694年11月6日在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特斯瓦納。

nameMeanings.name: Gillingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Dorset, Norfolk, and Kent, named Gillingham, ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of Gylla’, an unattested Old English personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham was born in 1635, in Swanage, Dorset, England. She married Thomas Giles Chapman on 6 October 1689, in Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 November 1694, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Swanage, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham est née en 1635, à Swanage, Dorset, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Giles Chapman le 6 octobre 1689, à Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1694, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Swanage, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham wurde 1635 in Swanage, Dorset, England geboren. Sie hat am 6. Oktober 1689 in Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, England Thomas Giles Chapman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. November 1694 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Swanage, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham è nata il nel 1635 nel Swanage, Dorset, England. Lei sposato Thomas Giles Chapman il 6 ottobre 1689, nel Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1694, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Swanage, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillinghamは1635年にイギリスドールセトスワナッジで生まれた。1689年10月6日にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン スティープレトンでThomas Giles Chapmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年11月6日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトスワナッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham(은)는 1635년 영국 도르세트 스와나지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1689년 10월 6일 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 스티플레턴에서 Thomas Giles Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 11월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 스와나지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham nasceu em 1635, em Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Thomas Giles Chapman em 6 de outubro de 1689, em Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1694, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham родилась в 1635 г. в местности сванадж, дорсет, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Giles Chapman 6 октября 1689 г. в местности винтирбурн стиплетон, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 ноября 1694 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности сванадж, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Katherine Gillingham nació en 1635, en Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra. Se casó con Thomas Giles Chapman el 6 de octubre de 1689, en Winterbourne Steepleton, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1694, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Swanage, Dorset, Inglaterra.
